---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the AGENTICAGENT.CHAT execution layer
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Logs & Traces
Include any relevant logs, traces, or terminal output here.
```
[Paste logs here]
```

## Fix Priority
Select one:
- [ ] 🚨 Must-Fix (Critical)
- [ ] ⚡ High Priority (Stability & Reliability)
- [ ] 📈 Medium Priority (Performance & Compliance)
- [ ] ✅ Nice-to-Have (Enhancements)

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS]
- Network: [e.g. Sepolia, Mainnet]
- Node Version: [e.g. 18.x]
- Any relevant context or screenshots?
